title: Garlicky Torrified Salt-and-Pepper Squid
description: A delectable Chinese dish featuring char-grilled squid seasoned with salt and pepper for a date-night treat that's also whole30-friendly.
instructions: Preheat your grill to medium-high heat.
Pat squid dry with paper towels and season it lightly with salt and pepper on all sides.
Grill the squid for about 3 minutes per side, until slightly charred and cooked through.
Sauté minced garlic in olive oil in a large skillet over medium heat until fragrant but not browned.
Add shredded cabbage to the skillet with the garlic and cook for about 2 minutes, stirring occasionally.
Toss the grilled squid into the skillet with the cabbage mixture. Season with additional salt and pepper to taste.
